validation.sourceNotes: Initial list converted from local-text/ba-palermo-luxury.md; heated-floor additions were researched from local-text/heated-floors-ba.md, BrightData Google searches/scrapes, regular web search, and then entered directly into this JSON. The original Markdown is not imported by the page.
validation.addressSource: Google Geocoding API using GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY_PRIVATE; included addresses were checked for non-partial matches, using rooftop precision where Google exposes it and exact street-address matches otherwise.
validation.availabilitySource: BrightData Google searches and scrapes, plus regular web search, for current rental, temporary-rental, Airbnb, and explicit heated-floor listing evidence. Airbnb matches were rechecked across all listed Palermo buildings on 2026-06-27, and missed exact matches were added.
validation.includedRule: Only named buildings with evidence of current long-term rental, temporary rental, or Airbnb availability are included.
validation.airbnbRule: Airbnb is marked confirmed only when an exact Airbnb search result named the building or exact address.
validation.localRentalAdSource: Representative local Argentine rental ads found through BrightData Google search and regular web search; omitted only when no concrete ad page is available.
validation.longTermRentSource: Monthly USD rent estimates target a 1-bedroom / 2-ambientes long-term rental. Direct 2-room listings are used where visible; temporary, studio, 3-room, 4-room, ARS-priced, or nearby comparable listings are normalized or extrapolated when direct long-term 1-bedroom inventory is not visible.
validation.officialWebsiteSource: Official website links point to exact building, developer, architecture, or construction project pages found through web search; ambiguous rental, hotel, marketplace, and social-only pages are left unlinked.
validation.heatedFloorRule: Heated-floor badges require literal listing/spec wording such as losa radiante, piso radiante, suelo radiante, or radiant heating for the building or exact address.
validation.heatedFloorCoverage: Rechecked all buildings on 2026-06-27 with BrightData Google searches and regular web search; every building currently in this JSON has building/address-specific heated-floor evidence.
